nodes.label: Impeccable Shared Design Laws
nodes.rationale: Universal design rules applying to both brand and product registers: OKLCH color with chroma reduction at extremes; dark/light theme chosen from physical scene sentence not default; 65-75ch body line length; varied spacing for rhythm; motion via ease-out-quart/quint/expo; absolute bans on side-stripe borders, gradient text, glassmorphism, hero-metric template, identical card grids, modal-as-first-thought.

nodes.label: AI Slop Test Principle
nodes.rationale: Two-altitude reflex check: first-order catches domain-predictable palette (e.g. 'observability -> dark blue'); second-order catches aesthetic-family predictability after avoiding first-order (e.g. 'fintech avoiding navy-gold -> terminal dark mode'). Both must fail before the design passes.

nodes.label: Brand Font Selection Procedure
nodes.rationale: Four-step procedure: write three brand-voice physical-object words; list reflex fonts and reject any on the ban list; browse real catalogs thinking of brand as physical object (museum caption, terminal manual, concert poster); cross-check that final pick doesn't line up with original reflex. Reflex-reject list bans Inter, DM Sans, Fraunces, Cormorant, Playfair, etc.

nodes.label: OKLCH Color Space Principle
nodes.rationale: OKLCH is perceptually uniform: equal lightness steps look equal unlike HSL. Tinted neutrals (chroma 0.005-0.015) toward brand hue create subconscious cohesion. Never pure #000 or #fff. Reduce chroma as lightness approaches extremes.

nodes.label: Working Memory Rule (≤4 items)
nodes.rationale: Humans hold ≤4 items in working memory (Miller's Law revised by Cowan 2001). Navigation menus ≤5 top-level items, form sections ≤4 fields per group, action buttons: 1 primary + 1-2 secondary, pricing tiers ≤3 options.

nodes.label: Animation Timing and Easing Principles
nodes.rationale: Durations: 100-150ms instant feedback, 200-300ms state changes, 300-500ms layout changes, 500-800ms entrance. Easing: ease-out-quart, ease-out-quint, ease-out-expo. Banned: bounce (cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)) and elastic. Exit animations ~75% of enter duration.

nodes.label: Live Mode Identity Lock Principle
nodes.rationale: Before generating variants, extract the existing surface's identity sentence describing: dominant surface color + accent, actual font names, layout topology, surface treatment, voice tone. Every variant must be readable as the same brand side-by-side. Identity lock prevents off-brand variants.

nodes.label: Craft Production Quality Bar
nodes.rationale: Production bar checklist: real content (no placeholders), preserve approved mock's major ingredients, semantic HTML first, deliberate spacing and alignment, intentional typography, realistic state coverage (default/hover/focus/active/disabled/loading/error/success/empty/overflow), finished interaction quality, coherent icon set, respect build pipeline, verify image URLs, optimized imagery, premium motion, maintainable, technically clean.

nodes.label: Codex Four Stop Points Before Code
nodes.rationale: Before writing any code in craft flow with native image generation: Step A - direction questions answered (stop, wait); Step B - palette confirmed (stop, wait); Step C - mocks generated and direction approved or delegated (stop, wait); Step D - return to craft Step 4. Shape confirmation alone is not a green light to code.
nodes.norm_label: codex four stop points before code
